description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that analyzes code on push to master and for-*.*.*/sync branches, on pull requests to those branches, and weekly on a schedule. Run an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for different languages (c-cpp and python), checking out the repository, initializing CodeQL tools, and performing CodeQL analysis. For c-cpp with manual build mode, install dependencies, update submodules, and build the project with CMake before analysis.
